sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n424" key="a)gelaiw/n" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀγελαιών</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ῶνος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n424.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">a place for herds</tr_> (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">τὰ ἀγελαῖα</etym>), <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">pasture</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
